description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named auto release that triggers on push events with tags matching v*.*.*. The workflow should run on a windows-latest environment with PowerShell as the shell. It should check out the code, install NSIS, determine the version from the tag, and then perform a series of steps to set up MSVC environments for both x64 and x86 architectures. This includes caching and setting up libraries, creating assets for each architecture, and finally creating a draft release with the generated assets.
